title: polypodium pteropus var. minor
intro: Polypodium pteropus var. minor, also known as the Polypodium leucotomos var. minor, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiproliferative effects. The health benefits associated with Polypodium pteropus var. minor include protection against skin damage from UV radiation, improvement of autoimmune diseases, and potential anti-cancer properties. Polypodium pteropus var. minor is often prepared as a herbal supplement or topical cream, and its extracts have been studied for their potential therapeutic applications.
